demographics.living_situation: lives with a roommate, who is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs just completely gave out when I tried to stand, my face feels swollen, and my heart is pounding in my head.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last couple of days my legs got weaker and weaker, and tonight I couldn't stand at all and went down onto the carpet — I can't get myself back up.

symptom_narrative.onset: the leg weakness has been building over the past two days and suddenly got much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours, worse in the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: my legs feel heavy and weak, mostly around the hips and thighs, and they just gave way when I tried to stand
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that I fell and now I can't get up off the floor on my own
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both legs, mainly the tops of my thighs and hips; also a pounding headache
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand or take my own weight
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a pounding headache, my heart feels like it's thumping in my head, my face looks puffier and rounder lately and my belly is more swollen
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my legs have felt a bit weak on and off recently but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in the chair and can't stand or walk without help

past_medical_history.how_managed: prescribed an antidepressant but I don't take it reliably

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I drink a lot of alcohol every day and have for a long time

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: around 15 standard drinks a day, every day, for a long time
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a roommate; multiple empty alcohol bottles around the living area

objective_data_offered.value: my roommate says my face has gotten rounder and puffier over the last few weeks and my belly looks more swollen out the front
some new coarse hair on my face recently
I can't stand up or take any weight on my legs since I went down onto the carpet
roommate says I seem agitated and I smell of alcohol
several empty alcohol bottles around the living area
